news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems Confirms Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results Will Be Released August 7, 2026
news.summary: The company will release Q2 2026 results before the market open on Friday, August 7, 2026, followed by a management webcast conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET, formally locking in the date that analyst-calendar trackers had previously only estimated.

news.headline: RPID shares jump over 6% intraday to $2.21-2.29, extending rebound off June lows
news.summary: Rapid Micro Biosystems shares rose to around $2.21-2.29 on July 15 (market cap roughly $103M); no company press release accompanied the move, so it appears to reflect broader small-cap biotech sentiment and a continued recovery from mid-to-late June lows near $1.70-1.85 rather than fresh company-specific news.

news.headline: Form 144: RPID insider notifies sale of 10,000 Class A shares from option exercise
news.summary: An RPID insider filed a Form 144 on July 8 to sell 10,000 Class A shares obtained via option exercise, the latest in a string of small routine insider sales also dated July 1 (6,312 shares), June 22 (3,688 shares) and June 10 (5,000 shares), together representing well under 1% of the roughly 41.7 million shares outstanding.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems presents at PDA Good Aseptic Manufacturing Conference 2026 in Frankfurt
news.summary: A Rapid Micro Biosystems field application scientist presented a poster at the June 11-12 PDA Good Aseptic Manufacturing Conference in Frankfurt, Germany, continuing the company's engagement with European pharma-manufacturing and quality-control audiences for the Growth Direct platform.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems Announces Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
news.summary: The company granted 60,000 restricted stock units to a newly hired employee (award dated June 3, 2026) as a material inducement to employment, vesting in three equal annual installments over three years.

news.headline: RPID short interest falls to about 166,100 shares, down 86% over the trailing 12 months
news.summary: Short interest data compiled in the period covering early-to-mid June 2026 showed roughly 166,100 RPID shares sold short, equal to about 0.5% of the float and down 7% from the prior reporting period and 86% year-over-year, with days-to-cover around 1.0, indicating limited bearish positioning against the stock.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings release and webcast
catalysts.detail: Rapid Micro Biosystems will report Q2 2026 results before the market open on Friday, August 7, 2026, with a management webcast call at 8:30 a.m. ET, confirmed via company press release on July 23. Management had guided Q2 revenue of at least $7.7M (at least 4 system placements) and gross margin in the mid-to-high teens, with net loss expected to step down versus Q1. Watch new Growth Direct placement cadence toward the 30-38 unit FY26 target, consumables pull-through, gross margin progress toward the ~20% FY26 goal, and cash runway following the May equity raise.

catalysts.label: Launch of next-generation cloud-native Growth Direct software platform
catalysts.detail: On the March 2026 Q4/FY25 earnings call, management said it plans to release a next-generation, cloud-enabled software platform in the second half of 2026, intended to enhance customer experience and expand value delivery through AI-driven analytics; no firm launch date or update has surfaced as of July 24.

catalysts.label: Continued Growth Direct multi-system order flow from large pharma/biologics customers
catalysts.detail: Following a record Q4 2025 multi-system order from Amgen (with Amgen sponsoring a North American Growth Direct Day in Q2 2026), a follow-on multi-system order from Samsung Biologics in Q1 2026, and the ongoing five-year global distribution agreement with Merck KGaA's MilliporeSigma life-science business, further large multi-system placement announcements from top-20 biopharma customers remain a key upside catalyst toward the FY26 guidance of 30-38 placements and $37-41M revenue; no new order has been publicly announced since March, through July 24.

pulse: Company-specific news flow stayed thin through mid-to-late July, with the main development being the July 23 confirmation that Q2 2026 results will land August 7 (previously just an analyst-calendar estimate). Aside from that, the only items were a June 10 inducement RSU grant, a Frankfurt PDA conference poster presentation, small recurring insider option-exercise sales under Form 144 (June 10, June 22, July 1, July 8, together well under 1% of shares outstanding), and a sharply reduced short-interest reading (~166,100 shares, down 86% year-over-year). The stock, still digesting May's dilutive ~$32M warrant-linked offering that drove KeyBanc and Lake Street to cut price targets to $5 and $7, bottomed near $1.70-1.85 in mid-to-late June and has since traded back up toward roughly $2.20-2.30 by mid-July on no clearly identified company catalyst. Fundamentally the business continues executing on Growth Direct placements and the MilliporeSigma/Samsung Biologics/Amgen channel (FY26 guidance of 30-38 placements/$37-41M revenue reaffirmed), and the near-term story is now a confirmed wait for the August 7, 2026 Q2 report, plus, further out, the planned H2 2026 launch of a next-generation cloud-native software platform, to show whether placement and consumables momentum is offsetting continued cash burn and dilution.
